zh.lifeSummary: 當William Symes於1485年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親Adam Symmes25歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Isham20歲。他於1510年與Agnes Colander在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年6月在英國英格蘭薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Symes于1485年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，他的父亲Adam Symmes25岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Isham20岁。他于1510年与Agnes Colander在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年6月在英国英格兰薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特。

meanings: English (Dorset and Somerset): variant of   Sims  .

variants.name: Sims
meanings: variant of Sim , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
topographic name for one who lived or worked at the house of someone called Symme (Simon).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Symes was born in 1485, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam Symmes, was 25 and his mother, Mary Elizabeth Isham, was 20. He married Agnes Colander in 1510, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in June 1547, in South Petherton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Symes est né en 1485, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam Symmes, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Isham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Colander en 1510, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1547, à South Petherton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre.

Er hat 1510 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Agnes Colander geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1547 im Alter von 62 Jahren in South Petherton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Somerset, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William Symesが1485年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Adam Symmesは25歳，母Mary Elizabeth Ishamは20歳であった。1510年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでAgnes Colanderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年6月にイギリスイギリスソメルセトソウス ペスエルトンで62歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Symes(이)가 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Symmes(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Isham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Agnes Colander(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 소우스 페더턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Symes родился в 1485 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam Symmes было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Isham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Colander в 1510 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер июнь 1547 г. в местности соут петиртон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия.
